## Summary

Describe the feature you want.

## Use Case

What workflow or user problem would this solve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the expected inputs, outputs, and behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any workaround or alternative you already tried.

## Additional Context

Add links, screenshots, API docs, or examples if relevant.
